title: ShinjiLilith AsukaAdam No touchy
wikitext:
[]: Shinji=Lilith, Asuka=Adam. No touchy.             Quote Post by DarkJesus » Sun Dec 04, 2005 5:10 pm Ok, I'm a new user here, so I've gotta warn you lot that you'll be getting a lot of these. A lot of these could be dismissed as me over-analysing. Anyway, here's the first one. Seeing as Shinji pilots unit 01, which is created from Lilith and Asuka pilots Unit 02, which is born from Adam, could this be translated as a basis for their difficulty to get together?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Dec 04, 2005 5:23 pm I don't think its a direct coralation no.

[]:             Quote Post by DarkJesus » Sun Dec 04, 2005 5:34 pm Ya, I thought so. Why am I a technician?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Dec 04, 2005 5:44 pm DarkJesus wrote: Ya, I thought so. Why am I a technician?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Dec 04, 2005 6:27 pm Shinji being depressed might also have somthing to do with it.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Dec 04, 2005 6:29 pm Tuesday is coming, did you bring your coat?

[]: Re: Shinji=Lilith, Asuka=Adam. No touchy.             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Dec 04, 2005 6:41 pm DarkJesus wrote: Seeing as Shinji pilots unit 01, which is created from Lilith and Asuka pilots Unit 02, which is born from Adam, could this be translated as a basis for their difficulty to get together?
